mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount
FROM attachment_download_history

SELECT
attachment_idx, board_idx, (select f.board_name from board f where f.board_idx = e.board_idx) as board_name, board_article_idx, (select f.subject from board_article f where f.board_article_idx = e.board_article_idx) as subject, server_file_name, attachment_name, attachment_ext, attachment_size, DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as date_created, user_ip, user_country, user_subdivision, user_city
FROM attachment_download_history e
ORDER BY date_created DESC
LIMIT #{skipCount}, #{listLimit}
